deploy.buildCommand: node scripts/write-backend-build-meta.mjs && if [ -d backend ]; then cd backend; fi; npm install --omit=dev
deploy.startCommand: if [ -d backend ]; then cd backend; fi; export UPLOAD_STORAGE_ROOT="${UPLOAD_STORAGE_ROOT:-${RAILWAY_VOLUME_MOUNT_PATH:-/app/uploads}}"; mkdir -p "$UPLOAD_STORAGE_ROOT/transactions" "$UPLOAD_STORAGE_ROOT/bank-slips" "$UPLOAD_STORAGE_ROOT/vendor-documents" "$UPLOAD_STORAGE_ROOT/crm-contacts" "$UPLOAD_STORAGE_ROOT/chat"; node server.js
